summary: Product-shaping work starts from validated knowledge: an Accepted Knowledge Baseline is named before specification; knowledge lives in governed packs retrieved via a declared adapter.

rules.rule: Product-shaping / complex / AI-assisted / cross-boundary / new-domain work names the accepted knowledge baseline it designs from BEFORE specification.
A product-shaping feature/spec/briefing carries a 'Knowledge Baseline' section (pack id/version/path + retrieval adapter + why it applies) before implementation approval.
Captured knowledge lives inside a governed pack (required artifacts, metadata with lifecycle status, sources) — not in loose notes beside the packs.
Bind a feature implementation to a candidate (non-accepted) pack — allowed only when the work IS the knowledge-reconstruction task itself.

watch.note: declared unwatched — needs pack-status × feature-binding cross-check; growth candidate for check-knowledge-pack
